# Zeke's Bar Mitzvah

> Saturday May 9, 2026. Morning Torah service in Redwood Glen (Oakland), reception at Piedmont Veterans Memorial Building. Logistics page for human guests and AI agents.

This site is unlisted (noindex, not in sitemap, not linked from anywhere). If you found it, you were meant to find it.

## Primary content

- [page.txt](https://benjaminste.in/zekes-bar-mitzvah/page.txt): clean markdown copy of the logistics page (served as text/plain)
- [index.json](https://benjaminste.in/zekes-bar-mitzvah/index.json): event-shaped structured data — schedule, locations, attire, parking, contacts
- [event.ics](https://benjaminste.in/zekes-bar-mitzvah/event.ics): RFC 5545 iCalendar with both VEVENTs

## MCP

- [mcp.json](https://benjaminste.in/zekes-bar-mitzvah/mcp.json): MCP server descriptor
- Stdio MCP server: `npx github:benstein/zeke-bar-mitzvah-mcp` ([source](https://github.com/benstein/zeke-bar-mitzvah-mcp))

## Day-of contact

Text Gabi (on-call): +1-510-207-3137. Cell reception is poor in the redwoods.
